message:
Running command: # Also restore the swd_seq.vh to the correct content (we replaced it temporarily)
cp /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/tb/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss_swd_seq.vh \
   /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/.mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp/tb/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss_swd_seq.vh

# For SRAM seq - keep smoke_expect_eq (AHB-to-SRAM works correctly)
# Verify SRAM seq still has the checks
grep -c "smoke_expect_eq" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/.mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_socgen_tmp/tb/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss_sram_seq.vh
